ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Person responsible for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the issue */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority of the issue */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the issue */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component of the issue */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the issue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Person the issue is assigned to */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date for the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue (e.g., fixed, won't fix, duplicate) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the issue */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the issue */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the issue */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the issue */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Other issues that this issue depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., needs work, needs review, active) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., bug report, feature request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., field system, views.module) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., 8.x-dev) */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
